features.name: Monomer Library Provider
features.description: Exposes a HELM-compatible monomer library to Datagrok's Bio/Chem ecosystem via the monomerLibProvider role, enabling downstream plugins to query and use monomer data.
features.evidence_summary: The monomerLibProvider meta-role on the main function, plus all read-side queries and the readme, form the provider integration surface for downstream plugins.

features.name: Monomer Data Management
features.description: Provides database-level write operations to create and update monomers, monomer properties, and libraries in the MonomerDB backing store.
features.evidence_summary: The upsert/create query names share a write-side pattern against the same mdb1 connection, indicating a distinct data-management capability.

features.name: Monomer Info Panel
features.description: Registers an info panel that surfaces monomer details in the Datagrok context panel when a monomer entity is selected.
features.evidence_summary: The untagged 'info' function combined with the set of info-panel documentation pages suggests a monomer detail panel registered as a Datagrok info pane.
